title: cryptostylis erecta
intro: Cryptostylis erecta, also known as the 'Rabbit Orchid', is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cryptostylis erecta include the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the roots or leaves to be used in infusions, decoctions, or topical applications.
